hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); content=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.new_string // .tool_input.content // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'src/.*\.(tsx|ts)$' && echo "$content" | grep -qF '—'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Long dash (\u2014) detected. Use a comma, colon, or hyphen instead."}'; exit 2; fi
